name: Truepush
description: Truepush — free web push notification platform with unlimited subscribers, segmentation, and RSS-to-push automation.

seo.title: Truepush — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: Truepush: Truepush — free web push notification platform with unlimited subscribers, segmentation, and RSS-to-push automation.

when_to_use: Free web push notifications with unlimited subscriber tier
Segmented push campaigns for SMB e-commerce stores

pros: Truly free tier with unlimited subscribers
cons: Web push only — no mobile app support
Upsell pressure on free tier users
Analytics and support depth are thin
review.verdict: Aggressive free pricing makes it attractive for bloggers; pros will outgrow limitations quickly.
review.best_for: Bloggers and small publishers starting with zero budget
review.not_for: Serious ecommerce, SaaS, or mobile apps
